parameters.query:
SELECT MAX(Id) as Id
FROM PastEmails
WHERE Email = '{{ $json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1]|| $json.headers.from }}' AND isDeleted = 0

INSERT INTO PastEmails (Email, Contents, threadId) 
VALUES 
  (
    '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}', 
    '{{$node["Gmail Trigger"].json.text}}',
    '{{$node["Gmail Trigger"].json.threadId}}'
    
  );
SELECT Contents FROM PastEmails WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}' AND isDeleted = 0

INSERT INTO PastEmails (Email, Contents, threadId)
SELECT
  '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}',
  '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.text }}',
  pe.threadId
FROM (
  SELECT TOP 1 threadId
  FROM PastEmails
  WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}'
  AND isDeleted = 0
  ORDER BY Inserted_at DESC
) pe;

UPDATE PastEmails 
SET isDeleted = 1 
WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}' AND isDeleted = 0

parameters.text:
Dobrý den,

bohužel už Vám více pomoci nemůžem. Prosíme obrat'te se na číslo uvedené níže.

firma

=Hello, determine whether following email written in Czech is related to a reservation date. If not, answer with 'no'. If yes, answer with 'yes'. Answer only once. Here is the email: {{ $('Gmail Trigger').item.json.text }}

parameters.query: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}'

parameters.subject: Email not registered
parameters.text:
=Dobrý den, 
Bohužel v našem systému nejste zapsáni. Prosím registrujte se níže.

=Analyze the following email exchange in Czech/Slovak to determine whether in the most recent user email, the user is responding to the rezervations sent by the admin or if the user is respecifying information about the rezervation the user would like to cancel in the user emails before. If its the respecifying case then output 'yes'. If no, output 'no'. Here is the email correspondence: {{ $('ReformatSQLOutput').item.json.textBody }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE PastEmails 
SET isDeleted = 1 
WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}' AND isDeleted = 0

SELECT TOP 1 threadId as threadId
FROM PastEmails
WHERE Email = '{{ $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $node["Gmail Trigger"].json.headers.from }}'
AND isDeleted = 0
ORDER BY Inserted_at DESC;
